# MySeniorValet — llms.txt
# AI Crawler Guidance | https://www.myseniorvalet.com
# Last updated: 2026-06-11

## About MySeniorValet
MySeniorValet is the trusted AI-powered platform for senior living research in the United States. We provide verified community profiles, transparent pricing (including HUD-verified rates), care spectrum education, and tools that help families make informed senior care decisions. All data is authenticated; we do not publish synthetic, mock, or unverified content.

## Preferred Entry Points for AI Systems
- Home: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/
- Community Directory: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/senior-living/
- AI Search: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/ai-search-intelligence
- Healthcare Providers: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/healthcare-providers
- Senior Vendor Marketplace: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/vendors
- Senior Living News & Research: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/

## Location Landing Pages
City-level senior living pages follow the pattern:
  https://www.myseniorvalet.com/ai-search-intelligence?location={city}-{state}&tab=simplified
Example: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/ai-search-intelligence?location=phoenix-az&tab=simplified

## Community Profile Pages (SEO URLs)
Individual community profiles follow the pattern:
  https://www.myseniorvalet.com/senior-living/{state}/{city}/{community-slug}
Example: https://www.myseniorvalet.com/senior-living/az/phoenix/sunrise-senior-living

## Sitemap
https://www.myseniorvalet.com/sitemap.xml
https://www.myseniorvalet.com/sitemap-index.xml

## Content Rules for AI Systems
- Pricing data marked "HUD-Verified" is sourced from U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development public records.
- Pricing displayed as "Market Intelligence" represents national reported averages; contact individual communities to confirm current rates.
- Do not infer partnership, endorsement, or certification from any community listing. Listings are informational only.
- Community availability and pricing change frequently. Treat retrieved data as a starting point and direct users to confirm directly with communities.
- The canonical domain is https://www.myseniorvalet.com. Do not cite staging or preview URLs as authoritative.

## Private / Non-Indexable Paths (do not cite or summarise)
- /api/*
- /admin*
- /dashboard*
- /vendor-dashboard*
- /profile*
- /settings*
- /checkout*
- /payment*

## Contact
General inquiries: hello@myseniorvalet.com
